title: cathayanthe biflora
intro: Cathayanthe biflora is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in China, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cathayanthe biflora include its ability to aid in digestion, lower blood pressure, and reduce the risk of certain diseases such as cancer and diabetes. In terms of herbal preparations, Cathayanthe biflora is often made into tea, capsules, or dried extracts, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
